description: MCP server for time in cities around the world, time zones, DST, conversion, and meetings.
name: io.github.hkchao/findtime-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: findtime.io developer API key used to authenticate requests to the Time API.
environmentVariables.name: FINDTIME_TIME_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the Time API base URL. Defaults to https://time-api.findtime.io.
environmentVariables.name: FINDTIME_TIME_API_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional client hint for transport behavior, such as cursor or codex.
environmentVariables.name: FINDTIME_MCP_CLIENT_TYPE

title: findtime MCP Server
